info.name: Talk Browser
info.summary: Browse Talk conversation content by type: files, links, images, audio and more
info.description:
Talk Content Browser adds a dedicated page to Nextcloud where you can explore the content shared in any Talk conversation — grouped by type.
**Features:** - Browse content in any Talk conversation (defaults to Note to Self) - Tabs for: All, Images & Video, Files, Audio, Voice notes, Links, Locations, Other - Search within each content type - Click any item to open it or jump to its message in Talk
**Requirements:** Nextcloud Talk (spreed) must be installed and enabled.
info.author: Code Cicada
